subcodes.first_line: Verily, utterance was hidden within the Kingdom of My knowledge, and when I manifested My Self, I revealed it and caused it to descend upon whom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البیان کان مکنونا فی ملکوت علمی فلما اظهرت نفسی اظهرته و انزلته علی من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
